etapas.system_message: You are a scriptwriter for YouTube videos. Create a powerful opening hook.
etapas.prompt: Create a compelling 2-minute hook for a video about: {{tema}}

etapas.system_message: You are a scriptwriter. Develop the main body of the script.
etapas.prompt:
Continue and develop this script hook into a full narrative:

{{saida_anterior}}

etapas.system_message: Expand the content to 25000+ characters maintaining tone and depth.
etapas.prompt:
Expand this script to maximum length:

{{saida_anterior}}

import re
cleaned = saida_anterior
cleaned = re.sub(r'\*\*.*?\*\*', '', cleaned)
resultado = cleaned.strip()
